description: An intelligence analyst is monitoring a legacy foreign government portal that only supports unencrypted HTTP. Because Tor Browser enforces HTTPS globally to prevent exit-node interception, configure a permanent exception for 'http://neverssl.com' so it loads without security warnings. Navigate to http://neverssl.com, copy the main text content from the page, and save it to /home/ga/Documents/neverssl_evidence.txt. Ensure the file contains the word 'NeverSSL'.
